examples.title: Abstraction Example
examples.description: An example of abstraction in C++
examples.code: class Car { private: Engine engine; public: void start() { engine.start(); } };
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates abstraction by hiding the implementation details of the Engine class and exposing only the necessary information through the start() method.

examples.title: Encapsulation Example
examples.description: An example of encapsulation in C++
examples.code: class PillBox { private: Medicine medicine; public: void takeMedicine() { medicine.take(); } };
examples.explanation: This code demonstrates encapsulation by bundling the Medicine class and its methods within the PillBox class.
